siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 4 by 6 at 45 percent. Strength: Romanian Deadlift (RDL), 4 by 8 at 45 percent. Strength: Seated Cable Row, 3 by 10. Strength: Hamstring Curl, 3 by 10. Metcon: AMRAP 15 minutes: 400m Run, 6 Deadlift 100/70, 8 T2B. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, shoulders, biceps.
